title: Pet Prime Automatic Dog Ball Launcher, Dog Ball Thrower with 10-30 Ft Launch Distance, Interactive Puppy Pet Fetch Toy, Mini Ball Throwing Machine for Small and Medium Dogs, With 3 PCS 2" Tennis Balls
features: 【PERFECT GAME FOR DOG】Automatic ball launcher trains your pet's behavior and keeps your pet energetic which makes it a perfect game to play with your pet indoors or outdoors. This is a mini dog tennis ball launcher for training and playing with mini dog only.

【ADJUSTABLE LAUNCH DISTANCE】The dog ball launcher has 3 different shooting ranges, which can help to adjust the shooting range between 10-30ft. (30 ft is the maximum range for a new ball, and the maximum distance can only be reached when the adapter is plugged in. Do not place wet or dirty balls in the device as this will affect the range and damage the device. Make sure you place the ball in the correct position before launching)

【EASY TO OPERATE】Three standard 2-inch tennis balls included, ideal for a game of fetch. Works with 6 pieces of normal C batteries (not included), or with AC adapter (included). This is a small ball launcher, the small ball is only suitable for small and medium-sized dogs to exercise and play, larger dogs may swallow the small ball.

【IMPORTANT NOTES】Only one ball can be inserted into the ball thrower at a time, if more than one ball is inserted into the ball thrower at a time, wait at least 5 seconds before inserting the next ball, or the machine will get stuck.the machine will jam. This mini ball throwing machine can only work with our mini tennis balls. Other balls will not work with our launcher. There are extra mini tennis balls set of 3 in our shop.
【HIGH QUALITY】This ball launcher is made of ABS plastic and can be played both indoors and outdoors. Three high quality mini 2‘’ tennis balls set of 3 are included.

Automatic Dog Ball Launcher Merchant video Only One Ball at a Time Only one ball at a time or the machine will get stuck! Two Power Charge Works with 6 pcs normal C batteries ( not included ), or with AC adapter (included). HOW TO USE Open the Power on/off button Open the power switch at the bottom to turn launcher on. The launch distance indicator(10ft/3m) green light will turn on. Select the Launch Distance Press the launch distance selection button during use to select 10ft, 20ft, 30ft transmit distance in turn. Put a Ball into Ball Basket When place a ball into the ball basket, launcher will throw the ball after 5s, please wait 5s before throwing the second ball, will follow this cycle. Have a Good Time with Your Dog Then spend quality time with your pet using our dog fetch ball thrower！ Previous page Next page 1 STEP 1 2 STEP 2 3 STEP 3 4 STEP 4 What is the maximum range? The maximum range is 30ft, The biggest launch distance may drop to 8m when in low battery condition. Why does the range not match the reality? Once the ball gets wet and dirty, the range will get smaller. What size dog is this dog ball launcher suitable for? Suitable for small dog. Is this dog ball launcher suitable for commercially available tennis balls? The ball launcher can only work with our balls. Other balls will not match our launcher.
